---
title: "The Tragedy of the Commons Is a False and Dangerous Myth"
description: "'The Tragedy of the Commons' needs not be the only way."
author: synesis
date: "2023-01-03"
categories: [society, links]
image: image.jpg
---

![](image.jpg)

'The Tragedy of the Commons' needs not be the only way. Let's start a new and hopeful 2023! [[1]](#ref-1)

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_the-tragedy-of-the-commons-is-a-false-and-activity-7016061014299336704-EiK2).*

## References

<a id="ref-1"></a>[1] "The Tragedy of the Commons Is a False and Dangerous Myth." *Aeon Essays*. <https://aeon.co/essays/the-tragedy-of-the-commons-is-a-false-and-dangerous-myth>
